ex {
	var x T
	strict x
	F(x) -> G(x)
}
-- x.go --
package m

type T struct{ V int }

type Alias = T

func F(t T) int { return t.V }
func G(t T) int { return t.V + 1 }

func _() {
	var a Alias
	_ = F(a)
	var t T
	_ = F(t)
}
-- stdout --
diff old/x.go new/x.go
--- old/x.go
+++ new/x.go
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@

 func _() {
 	var a Alias
-	_ = F(a)
+	_ = G(a)
 	var t T
-	_ = F(t)
+	_ = G(t)
 }
